About Us

Supplying beauty professionals
with confidence.

L&B Aesthetic Suppliers was founded with one goal in mind: to give beauty therapists and salon owners access to high-quality professional supplies at fair, transparent prices — without the hassle.

We know that running a treatment room means keeping on top of stock, quality, and costs all at once. That's why we carry everything you need in one place — from gloves and PPE to skincare retail products, waxing essentials, lash & brow supplies, and sterilisation equipment.

Whether you're stocking up a busy salon or setting up your first treatment space, we're here to make sure you have exactly what you need, when you need it.

Fast Dispatch

Orders dispatched promptly

Professional Grade

Trusted by therapists

Equipment & Tools

Facial Steamer with Ozone

Professional facial steamer with ozone function to open pores, soften skin, and enhance product absorption. Adjustable steam output and 360° rotating nozzle. Ideal for facial treatments.

Waxing & Hair Removal

Hard Wax Beans — 500g

Premium low-melt hard wax pellets for all body areas. Grips short hair effectively while being gentle on skin. No strips needed — simply peel off once set.

Hyaluronic Acid Serum — 30ml

Our range is always growing.

New products land regularly — sign up and we'll let you know when fresh stock arrives.

You're on the list! We'll be in touch when new stock arrives.

Simple Process

How to place an order

No account needed. No complicated checkout. Just browse, order, pay — and we'll dispatch.

1

Browse & Select

Shop our full range of professional aesthetic supplies. Use the category filters to find exactly what you need.

2

Submit Your Order

Add items to your order, fill in your delivery details, and submit. You'll receive a confirmation email.

3

Bank Transfer

Pay via bank transfer using the details provided after ordering. Use your full name as the payment reference.

4

We Dispatch

Once payment is confirmed, we dispatch your order promptly. Estimated dispatch: 3–5 working days.

Browse Products

Get in Touch

Questions?
We're here to help.

Whether you want to check product availability, ask about bulk orders, or just need some advice on what to stock — get in touch and we'll get back to you as quickly as we can.
